{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032409260610FCB3EDF8D781B7A80F"}"},"total":1555},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7569424680791261976","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"个人感觉这本对人物刻画也比较到位，行文幽默，很多看点，配角也很生动。就是剧情有点拖，有坑没填，希望作者后期不要写崩。
对于打发时间的网络小说，特别是传统历史文来说大体没有问题，一直在追更，作者加油！稳定更新，不要断更！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1762398518,"group_id":"7558316280189553688","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1NYC6iV3rwd7xmV5S5T0XA=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"722816386478347","user_name":"✔玲玲172-206"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"722816386478347","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7558316280189553688","book_info":{"abstract":"【无系统+架空+种田+打猎+慢热+非爽文+争霸】
“玉城，你要媳妇不要？只要你开金口，我这就给你送来。”
“那你就给我送来呗。”
沈玉城本以为是一句玩笑话，可却没想到真得了个如花似玉的媳妇儿。
王朝末年，群雄割据，流民遍地。
家徒四壁的沈玉城，为了养活自己和媳妇儿，只能背起猎弓，冒着风雪进山打猎。
却没想到这个媳妇儿，竟然是一个极有智慧的高门千金。
流民掠境，沈玉城以军功起家，逐步成长为西凉军阀，手中猛将如云。
东出西凉，逐鹿中原，以三尺锋刃，立不世之功。

ead_book_count":0,"read_duration":61285,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":14451},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1762398728,"author_reply_time":1762399067,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7569450848714310462","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"开始只是随便翻翻，前三章的读者互动态也太多了，根本看不过来，有点意思。
但看一段后，被逐渐吸引，一口气看到最新章节。作者文笔流畅，细节刻画幽默风趣。
与其他穿越题材相比，没有系统，没有金手指，就是个普通人，在乱世努力生活的故事，有血有肉，接近现实，很多片段都有同感，情节连贯，虽无大的跌宕起伏，却也演绎合理，毫无突兀，各种笑点不断，读者互动也很搞笑。
工作之余，换换脑子，缓解压力，不错。","text_exts":[{"e":102,"s":99,"text":"普通人","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%99%AE%E9%80%9A%E4%BA%BA&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177431556681B7A80F%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227569450848714310462%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227558316280189553688%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%99%AE%E9%80%9A%E4%BA%BA%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1762404102,"group_id":"7558316280189553688","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5taMiondKb0AkGn2JfImhWgMCeGKeDNxeDsL98tV22T","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/9c9450cc3919428ea177076b227a342e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776882273&x-signature=oc9izgvBk2f7NosLq%2F4Gj1iUG3s%3D","user_id":"2095024050279763","user_name":"我喜欢编磬"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2095024050279763","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7558316280189553688","book_info":{"abstract":"【无系统+架空+种田+打猎+慢热+非爽文+争霸】
